name: python3-iniconfig
title: python3-iniconfig
summary: brain-dead simple parsing of ini files
description:
brain-dead simple parsing of ini files
iniconfig is a small and simple INI-file parser module having a unique set of
features:
.
* maintains order of sections and entries
* supports multi-line values with or without line-continuations
* supports "#" comments everywhere
* raises errors with proper line-numbers
* no bells and whistles like automatic substitutions
* iniconfig raises an Error if two sections have the same name.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-iniconfig because brain-dead simple parsing of ini files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-iniconfig as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-iniconfig with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-iniconfig --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
